title: Podman volume create with rest api
body:
### Issue Description

I started to create Java api library for communicate with Podman rest api .    
My project URL :  [JPodman](https://github.com/mah454/jpodman)


[according podman api document](https://docs.podman.io/en/v3.0.0/_static/api-static.html#operation/libpodInspectVolume)  
i always receive this error :    
`{"cause":"EOF","message":"Decode(): EOF","response":500}`      

this is my curl :      
`curl -XPOST http://localhost:9000/v5.0.0.0/libpod/volumes/create?Name=test`

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. podman system service tcp:127.0.0.1:9000 -t 0
2. curl -XPOST http://localhost:9000/v5.0.0.0/libpod/volumes/create?Name=test


### Describe the results you received

Status code : 500 
result : {"cause":"EOF","message":"Decode(): EOF","response":500}

### Describe the results you expected

According to document i should receive status code 201 .

### podman info output

```yaml
nothing
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body:
OMG ! , exactly found problem after send this issue , sorry . 
i should pass parameters as POST request body .
